mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.email, u.mobile, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.id AS role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.description, p.id AS perm_id, p.perm_code, p.perm_name, p.type, p.path, p.icon FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id AND r.status = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON r.id = rp.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.perm_id = p.id AND p.status = 1 WHERE u.username = #{username} AND u.status = 1

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.email, u.mobile, u.status, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.id AS role_id, r.role_code, r.role_name, r.description, p.id AS perm_id, p.perm_code, p.perm_name, p.type, p.path, p.icon FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id AND r.status = 1 LEFT JOIN sys_role_permission rp ON r.id = rp.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_permission p ON rp.perm_id = p.id AND p.status = 1 WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.status = 1
